_docs.overview: This is an example asset pack. Copy this folder to create your own!

employees.how_it_works: Each sheet is a horizontal PNG strip of animation frames, read left-to-right.
employees.frame_order: Frames are grouped by state. Default order: idle, walk, type, think.
employees.framesPerState: Number of frames per animation state (e.g. 2 means 2 idle + 2 walk + 2 type + 2 think = 8 total).
employees.states: Optional. Override the order of states in the strip. E.g. ['walk', 'idle', 'type', 'think']. Missing states fall back to idle.
employees.states_reuse: Reuse a state for multiple positions: ['idle', 'walk', 'walk', 'idle'] if your sheet only has 2 unique animations.
employees.frameRates: Optional. Per-state FPS: { idle: 2, walk: 5, type: 6, think: 2 }. Override any or all.
employees.grid_sheets: Multi-row sheets are also supported. Each row = one state. Set 'rows' to map states to row indices.
employees.sheets: Map of role name -> PNG file. 'default' is used when no role matches. Agents are assigned sheets by role name, or distributed randomly if no match.
employees.frameSize: Optional. Width & height of each frame in pixels. Auto-detected if omitted.
employees.frameWidth_frameHeight: Optional. Use instead of frameSize for non-square frames.

furniture.how_it_works: Each item is a single PNG image (not a sprite sheet).
furniture.sizing: Images are scaled to fit the tile grid (48px per tile). Dimensions auto-detected, or set tilesWide/tilesTall.
furniture.desk_detection: Items named 'desk', 'desk_*', or 'desk-*' are auto-detected as desks. Or set 'desk': true.
furniture.desks: Desk items are work stations where agents sit when working.

background.how_it_works: A single PNG that replaces the entire office floor, walls, and windows.
background.modes: 'cover' (default) scales to fill maintaining aspect ratio. 'stretch' distorts to fit. 'tile' repeats the image.
background.recommended_size: 768x480 or larger for best quality (matches default 16x10 tile grid).

font.how_it_works: A .ttf, .woff, .woff2, or .otf font file that replaces the default pixel font in the UI.
font.auto_detect: Drop a font file in the pack root — it's auto-detected. Or set 'file' and optional 'name' in manifest.
font.name: Optional. The font-family name for the @font-face rule. Defaults to 'CustomPixelFont'.

employees._state_order: idle, walk, type, think (left-to-right in the strip)
